blended.narrative: Blacktail Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,205 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 6.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 37".
